title: Embrace Mobile Monitoring SDK Configuration File
description: A JSON Schema for the Embrace mobile monitoring SDK configuration file.

description.description: A brief description of the configuration.

schemaIdUrl.description: URL corresponding to version 1.0.0 of the configuration specification.

app_id.description: Exactly five characters long representing the application identifier.

api_token.description: Exactly thirty-two characters long representing a hexadecimal API token.

ndk_enabled.description: Whether native crash capture is enabled (true by default).
